interactions.summary: Jiang closes by acknowledging that the idea is hard and saying it will become clearer next semester, then asks for more questions before ending.

speaker_notes.note: The final 'Any more questions?' is Jiang's classroom prompt; no student question is preserved in the focus ref.

claims.claim: Jiang flags the monotheism-modernity argument as difficult and says subsequent course material will clarify it.

chronology_notes.note: The close points forward to next semester for fuller development of the hard monotheism and reality argument.
